title: GoldenCase
description: One evaluation scenario for one PitchTwin agent. Stored at evals/golden/<agent>/<id>.json

id.description: Unique within the agent; matches the filename stem.

agent.description: Must equal the parent directory name.

source.description: Ground-truth source data the output must stay faithful to (e.g. structured profile and/or client context). Used by hallucination + factual gates.

input.description: Exact arguments passed to the agent. Shape depends on the agent (see data-model).

expectations.description: Optional per-case overrides on top of schema + global rules.

must_not_claim.description: Strings/skills the output must NOT assert (adversarial grounding).

must_decline.description: Persona only: the response must be an honest declination.

expected_enums.description: Optional tightening of allowed enum values for this case.
